overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a grand gothic great hall interior from a video game, featuring high vaulted ceilings with wooden beams, ornate brass chandeliers, and tall arched windows. Several NPCs are seated at wooden tables in the spacious hall illuminated by warm mixed lighting.

wall-mounted brass lantern providing warm artificial lighting

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand gothic hall interior with high vaulted ceilings supported by wooden beams. Warm light filters through tall arched windows while ornate brass chandeliers hang from above. Several NPCs are seated at wooden tables engaged in quiet activities, and the camera remains fixed, capturing the atmospheric depth of the stone and wood architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a grand gothic great hall that emphasizes the stillness and scale of the interior. It begins by capturing the immense height of the vaulted ceilings supported by heavy wooden beams, where ornate brass chandeliers hang suspended in the air. As the eye wanders through the space, warm light filters through tall arched windows to illuminate the textures of the stone and wood architecture. The scene then settles on several NPCs seated at wooden tables engaged in quiet activities, maintaining a fixed perspective that preserves the solemn depth of the hall.
